title: rubus repens
intro: Rubus repens, also known as creeping raspberry, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is native to Europe and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and wounds, offering benefits like improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. Rubus repens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
